subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh amongst His servants, verily He is the Lord of creation, and through Him floweth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهدالله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بین العباد انه هو مالک الایجاد و به جری من
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God
